summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 7 features. All 9 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to test prerequisites). Frontend UI verified for all 3 new features: Verildi creates order, Yetərlidir stops service, and Table Transfer functionality.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor, inherited from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve correctly creates order with TS- prefix and 'Vaxtlı xidmət' in notes
POST /api/sessions/transfer correctly moves session, orders, and timed services to new table
Transfer validation working: rejects same table, rejects occupied table, returns 404 for non-existent resources
Frontend 'Verildi' button triggers order creation and shows toast 'Xidmət edildi kimi qeyd olundu'
Frontend 'Yetərlidir' button stops service and shows toast 'Vaxtlı xidmət dayandırıldı'
Frontend 'Masa Dəyişdir' button opens transfer dialog with table dropdown
Frontend 'Hesabı Bağla' button visible in session details modal
seed_data_creation: Created test timed services during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested. Key endpoints: PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve (creates TS- order), PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/stop (deactivates service), POST /api/sessions/transfer (moves session to new table). UI buttons: 'Verildi' (mark served), 'Yetərlidir' (stop service), 'Masa Dəyişdir' (transfer table), 'Hesabı Bağla' (close session). All working correctly.

features_tested.timed_service_serve_creates_order: PASS - PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve creates order with TS- prefix
features_tested.timed_service_serve_updates_count: PASS - serve_count increments, last_served_at and next_serve_at updated
features_tested.table_transfer_success: PASS - POST /api/sessions/transfer moves session to new table
features_tested.ui_masa_deyisdir_button: PASS - Button visible, opens transfer dialog
features_tested.ui_hesabi_bagla_button: PASS - Button visible in session details modal
features_tested.ui_transfer_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with table select dropdown

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/timed-services?session_id={id} - PASS (returns timed services for session)

elements: Summary cards (Məkan, Sifariş, Endirim, Xidmət haqqı, Cəmi)

toast_messages_verified: Vaxtlı xidmət əlavə edildi - when timed service created
Xidmət edildi kimi qeyd olundu - when Verildi clicked
Vaxtlı xidmət dayandırıldı - when Yetərlidir clicked
